title: Punishments
content: The punishments to which offenders are liable are: Qisas, Diyat, Arsh, Daman, Ta'zir, Death, Imprisonment for life, Imprisonment, Forfeiture of property, Fine.

title: Commutation of sentence of death
content: The Federal Government may commute the sentence of death to any other punishment provided by this Code.

title: Commutation of sentence of imprisonment for life
content: The Federal Government may commute the sentence of imprisonment for life for imprisonment of either description for a term not exceeding twenty-five years.

title: Power of Federal Government to commute
content: Nothing in sections 54 or 55 shall derogate from the right of the President or the Provincial Government to grant pardons.

title: Repealed
content: [Repealed by the Criminal Law (Amendment) Act, 1921].

title: Fractions of terms of punishment
content: In calculating fractions of terms of punishment, imprisonment for life shall be reckoned as equivalent to twenty-five years.

title: Repealed
content: [Repealed/Omitted by the Federal Laws (Revision and Declaration) Ordinance, 1981].

content: [Repealed/Omitted by the Federal Laws (Revision and Declaration) Ordinance, 1981].

title: Amount of fine
content: Where no sum is expressed, the amount of fine is unlimited, but shall not be excessive.

title: Sentence of imprisonment for non-payment of fine
content: In default of payment of fine, the court may direct imprisonment.

title: Limit to imprisonment for non-payment of fine
content: The term shall not exceed one-fourth of the term of imprisonment which is the maximum fixed for the offence.

title: Description of imprisonment for non-payment of fine
content: Imprisonment may be of any description to which the offender might have been sentenced for the offence.

title: Imprisonment for non-payment of fine, fine only
content: If the offence is punishable with fine only, the imprisonment shall be simple.

title: Imprisonment to terminate on payment of fine
content: The imprisonment shall terminate whenever the fine is paid or levied by process of law.

title: Termination on payment of proportional part
content: If a part of the fine is paid, the imprisonment shall terminate proportionately.

title: Fine leviable within six years
content: The fine may be levied at any time within six years after the passing of the sentence.

title: Limit of punishment of offence made up of several offences
content: Where an offence is made up of parts, the offender shall not be punished with more than the punishment provided for any one of such parts.

title: Punishment of person guilty of one of several offences
content: In cases of doubt, the offender shall be punished for the least severe of the offences.

title: Solitary confinement
content: Offender may be kept in solitary confinement for a portion of their imprisonment.

title: Limit of solitary confinement
content: Solitary confinement shall in no case exceed three months in the aggregate.

title: Enhanced punishment for certain offences
content: Enhanced punishment for subsequent offences under Chapter XII or XVII.
